flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Houston Christian University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.4k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Houston Christian University rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 ($35.5k → $39.4k).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Houston Christian University rose 24% between 2021 and 2024 (30.7% → 38.2%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Houston Christian University rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 (43.9% → 49.1%).
